response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'HOWL' (00:00-03:48) from on-screen text. Used search tool to find full lyrics for Ayumu Imazu's 'HOWL'. 2. Identified '依願' (03:49-05:00) from on-screen text. Performed search for lyrics using original artists (yama). Search tool did not return results for the lyrics of this specific song. Metadata is provided, lyrics set to null.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song 'HOWL' by Ayumu Imazu, followed by a vocal performance of the song '依願' (Igan) by yama. The performers are VTubers from hololive production.

scenes.description: Performers sing and dance to 'HOWL'. Music and lyrics by Ayumu Imazu.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kobo Kanaeru, Hakos Baelz, Nerissa Ravencroft

a voice that turns into unstable days
while i was saying all this

that day
chorus
a voice that resonates with a flashy echo
it still doesn't stop ringing

this hopeless emotion
it reflected you
